PreToolUse.command: if [ ! -f AGENTS.md ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"},"systemMessage":"AGENTS.md is missing. Either the SessionStart hook did not run, or this repo has not been bootstrapped yet. Run hook-bootstrap.sh manually, or use /bootstrap from VS Code chat."}' && exit 0; fi; CMD="${TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}" && if [ -n "$CMD" ] && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(find|grep|rg).*(node_modules|\.git|dist|build|\.next|target|__pycache__|venv)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"},"systemMessage":"⚠️ Your command targets node_modules or build directories — this may hang the terminal. Alternatives: use language tools (tsc --noEmit, cargo check), read package manifests, or narrow the search path."}'; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi
